purpose: Plan the manual competitor ads intelligence collection workflow from intake to audited dataset output.
design_intent: Keep planning artifacts small, deterministic, and aligned to the manual-only scope while preserving auditability and evidence capture.
change_impact: Introduces a new planning slice for competitor ad extraction without changing runtime automation.
problem_statement: Competitor ad details are scattered across text and image posts, making manual analysis slow and non-repeatable without a structured extraction workflow.
goals: Define a stable schema for competitor ad records
Document a manual, fail-closed extraction pipeline
Preserve evidence artifacts for audit and debugging
Enable low-volume, polite scraping that avoids detection
non_goals: Integration with scheduler or publisher flows

work_items.name: Finalize planning spec and data contract
actions: Create spec in .planning/spec-kit/specs
Create data contract in .planning/spec-kit/specs
Lock schema: remove redundant pricing object, move terms to optional, require evidence
acceptance: Contract defines record and run schemas with locked required/optional boundaries

work_items.name: Define vendor and post intake list
actions: Decide vendor list source: manual curation by operators
Define post URL intake format: CSV with columns vendor_id, post_url, notes_override
acceptance: Vendor list and post URL list format documented as a flat CSV structure

work_items.name: Design HTML extraction path
actions: Reuse lib/parser DOM projection (page_outline + subtree) for text extraction
Define selector discovery using page_outline on sample posts
Define HTML evidence capture (raw HTML + node path excerpts)
acceptance: Evidence excerpts recorded for text ads
Fallback path defined when parser confidence is low

work_items.name: Define OCR and VLM fallback
actions: Set OCR confidence thresholds (accept >=0.85, VLM trigger <0.75)
Define VLM schema-constrained prompt output
Define OCR/VLM evidence retention and rejection rules
Document runtime config (endpoint, timeouts, retries, max image size)

work_items.name: Define storage and artifact layout
actions: Choose primary output format (JSONL + gzip)
Define artifact folder structure
Define explicit path patterns for data and artifacts
acceptance: Path patterns documented for data and evidence

work_items.name: Plan manual trigger entry point
actions: Choose CLI-first trigger with optional API wrapper
Define idempotency and failure behavior
Include rate_limit_rps in manual inputs

work_items.name: Define validation checklist
actions: Document a dry-run sampling checklist
Define acceptance sampling size
Define minimum coverage requirements (text and image ads)
acceptance: Sampling plan documented with coverage rules
Spec and contract are stored under .planning/spec-kit/specs
Manual pipeline scope and artifacts are documented
